center.name: 波特蘭 (俄勒岡州)
center.summary: 波特蘭 (俄勒岡州)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Northern pygmy owl，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The northern pygmy owl is native to Canada, the United States, and Mexico. Their habitat includes temperate, subtropical and tropical moist forest, savanna, and wetlands. In Oregon and Washington they are known to nest and forage in the center of dense, continuous forests, near streams. An example of their habitat is Forest Park in Portland, Oregon, USA
